tasks.subject: Task 1: summoner.module.css — selective Hextech reskin
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Apply Hextech treatment to summoner-search subcomponents. SHOWCASE blocks (SummonerCard, RankDisplay, ChampionMastery, LiveGame) get Cinzel display + Cormorant editorial + gold-ruled chassis frames. LIGHT blocks (MatchHistory, MatchStatistics, PlayedWithAnalysis, search form, errors, loading, search history, keyboard shortcuts, tooltips) get color/token swap only — layout, font-family, padding stay identical. Win=hex-cyan, Loss=blood-red.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/app/league-of-legends/summoner.module.css`

**Verify:** Search a summoner; SummonerCard shows Cinzel name + Cormorant italic level; RankDisplay cards show Cinzel tier + gold gradient LP bar; ChampionMastery cards show Cinzel champion name + mono points; MatchHistory rows tinted cyan/red but otherwise compact and readable.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/league-of-legends/summoner.module.css"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["All `#6e4ff6`/`rgba(110,79,246,*)` references replaced with Hextech tokens", "Showcase blocks use Cinzel + Cormorant per spec", "Light blocks keep system fonts but color-swapped", "Win/loss accents use --hex-cyan / --blood-red", "Tooltip retinted to gold/parchment"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: KomplexaciStatus.module.css — full Hextech treatment
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Full Hextech treatment for member cards (Cinzel summoner names, gold-ruled chassis frames, cyan in-game pulse + `// IN GAME` mono badge) and GameDetailsModal (mirrors champion-modal aesthetic: gold-ruled shell, gold gradient header, cyan blue-team / blood-red red-team panels, gold-bordered bans grid with blood-red overlay).

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/app/league-of-legends/components/KomplexaciStatus.module.css`

**Verify:** Member cards display in Hextech style; in-game members glow cyan + show `// IN GAME` mono badge top-right; clicking an in-game member opens fully Hextech-styled GameDetailsModal with cyan/red team panels.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/league-of-legends/components/KomplexaciStatus.module.css"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["All purple/green tokens replaced with gold/cyan/blood-red", "Member cards use Cinzel summoner name + chassis frame", "In-game cards show cyan glow + `// IN GAME` badge", "GameDetailsModal mirrors champion-modal Hextech treatment", "Encouragement banner uses cyan + Cinzel + Cormorant"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: FilterPanel.module.css + FilterChips.module.css — light reskin
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Light reskin of filter UI to match the champion-grid filter bar already styled in `lol-redesign.css`: gold-faint borders, gold gradient active state, parchment-dim inactive text, blood-red clear/reset action, mono labels.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/app/league-of-legends/components/FilterPanel.module.css`
- Modify: `src/app/league-of-legends/components/FilterChips.module.css`

**Verify:** Open the filter panel and chips bar; everything reads as Hextech-toned (no purple), active states show gold gradient, clear actions show blood-red.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/league-of-legends/components/FilterPanel.module.css", "src/app/league-of-legends/components/FilterChips.module.css"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["All `#6e4ff6`/purple replaced", "Active filter buttons use gold gradient", "Clear/reset actions use blood-red", "Section headers use mono + uppercase + gold", "Chip data-type variants retinted (champion=gold, win=cyan, loss=red, etc.)"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Verification pass
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Walk the spec verification matrix end-to-end.

**Verify:** Visit /league-of-legends, scroll to SECTION 04 + SECTION 05, do a real summoner search, verify all surfaces. Verify /cs2 still synthwave. Verify console clean. Responsive at 1440 / 1024 / 768 / 375.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["No purple/blue (`#6e4ff6`/`rgba(110,79,246,*)`) anywhere in SECTION 04 or 05", "All 4 modules use Hextech tokens via inheritance from .lol-redesign", "Functionality unchanged (search submits, modal opens/closes, filters apply, keyboard shortcuts work)", "/cs2 still synthwave", "Responsive holds at 1440 / 1024 / 768 / 375", "Console clean"]}
```
